action.reasoning: Observation: 3-model ensemble gave AP=0.2903 (new best). Have 3.75h, 8 iters left. Each 100-epoch training takes ~36min. Analysis: Adding a 4th diverse model could push it slightly higher. I have time for ~3 more training runs. Decision: Train a 4th model (different seed=3, num_layers=6, emb_dim=350) for 100 epochs, then ensemble.
